parameters.query:
update public."Reserva" r
set
  "AlojamientoId" = a."AlojamientoId",
  "UpdatedAt" = now()
from public."Alojamiento" a
where
  r."AlojamientoId" is null
  and r."Reserva__idlisting" is not null
  and r."Reserva__idlisting" = a."AlojamientoStayslistingIdLargo";

update public."Reserva" r
set
  "HuespedId" = h."HuespedId",
  "UpdatedAt" = now()
from public."Huesped" h
where
  r."HuespedId" is null
  and r."Reserva__idclient" is not null
  and r."Reserva__idclient" = h."StaysClientId";

WITH pais_norm AS (
  SELECT
    p."PaisId",
    ('+' || regexp_replace(p."PaisCodigoTelefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) AS dial_plus,
    regexp_replace(p."PaisCodigoTelefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g')          AS dial_digits
  FROM public."Pais" p
  WHERE p."PaisCodigoTelefono" IS NOT NULL
    AND p."PaisCodigoTelefono" <> ''
    AND regexp_replace(p."PaisCodigoTelefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g') <> ''
),
huesped_norm AS (
  SELECT
    h."HuespedId",
    regexp_replace(h."Telefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AS phone_digits,
    CASE
      WHEN h."Telefono" ~ '^\s*\+' THEN
        '+' || regexp_replace(h."Telefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
      WHEN regexp_replace(h."Telefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g') ~ '^00' THEN
        '+' || substr(regexp_replace(h."Telefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 3)
      ELSE
        '+' || regexp_replace(h."Telefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
    END AS phone_plus
  FROM public."Huesped" h
  WHERE h."IdPais" IS NULL
    AND h."Telefono" IS NOT NULL
    AND h."Telefono" <> ''
),
best_match AS (
  SELECT
    h."HuespedId",
    p."PaisId",
    row_number() OVER (
      PARTITION BY h."HuespedId"
      ORDER BY length(p.dial_digits) DESC, p."PaisId"
    ) AS rn
  FROM huesped_norm h
  JOIN pais_norm p
    ON (
      h.phone_plus   LIKE p.dial_plus   || '%'
      OR
      h.phone_digits LIKE p.dial_digits || '%'
    )
)
UPDATE public."Huesped" h
SET "IdPais" = m."PaisId"
FROM best_match m
WHERE h."HuespedId" = m."HuespedId"
  AND m.rn = 1
  AND h."IdPais" IS NULL;
delete from "ReservaStage"

INSERT INTO public."Reserva" (
  "Reserva__id",
  "Reserva_id",
  "Reserva_creationDate",
  "Reserva_creationTime",
  "Reserva_creationDateTime",
  "Reserva_checkInDate",
  "Reserva_checkInTime",
  "Reserva_checkOutDate",
  "Reserva_checkOutTime",
  "Reserva__idlisting",
  "Reserva__idclient",
  "Reserva_type",
  "Reserva_agent",
  "Reserva_price",
  "Reserva_stats",
  "Reserva_guests",
  "Reserva_guestsDetails",
  "Reserva_reservationUrl",
  "Reserva_payload",
  "Reserva_status",
  "HuespedId",
  "AlojamientoId"
)
SELECT
  s."_id",
  s."id",
  s."creationDate"::date,
  s."creationTime"::time,
  s."creationDateTime"::timestamptz,
  s."checkInDate"::date,
  s."checkInTime"::time,
  s."checkOutDate"::date,
  s."checkOutTime"::time,
  s."_idlisting",
  s."_idclient",
  s."type",
  s."agent",
  s."price",
  s."stats",
  s."guests",
  s."guestsDetails",
  s."reservationUrl",
  s."payload",
  s."payload"->>'status',  -- Reserva_status
  NULL, -- HuespedId (lo podrás resolver después)
  NULL  -- AlojamientoId (lo podrás resolver después)
FROM public."ReservaStage" s
WHERE s."_id" IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM public."Reserva" r
    WHERE r."Reserva__id" = s."_id"
  );

SELECT
  (COUNT(*) > 0) AS "hasData",
  COUNT(*)       AS "cnt"
FROM public."Reserva"
WHERE "HuespedId" IS NULL OR "AlojamientoId" IS NULL;

SELECT
"Reserva__id"
FROM public."Reserva"
WHERE "HuespedId" IS NULL OR "AlojamientoId" IS NULL;

select 
  r."ReservaId",
  "Reserva__id",
  al."AlojamientoId",
  h."HuespedId",
  "Reserva_id",
  "Reserva_creationDate",
  "Reserva_checkInDate",
  "Reserva_checkOutDate",
  "Reserva_checkInTime",
  "Reserva_checkOutTime",
  "Reserva__idlisting",
  "Reserva__idclient",
  "Reserva_type",
  "Reserva_guests",
  "StaysClientId",
  "StaysContactId",
  "NombreCompleto",
  "Email",
  "Telefono",
  "IdPais",
  "AlojamientoNumero",
  "AlojamientoNombre",
  "AlojamientoStaysInternalName",
  "PaisNombreEspanol",
  "AseoReservaCheckOutId"
FROM public."Reserva" r
LEFT JOIN public."Huesped" h
  ON h."HuespedId" = r."HuespedId"
LEFT JOIN public."Alojamiento" al
  ON al."AlojamientoId" = r."AlojamientoId"
left join "Pais" p 
on h."IdPais" = p."PaisId"
left join "AseoReservaCheckOut" aseo 
on r."ReservaId" = aseo."ReservaId"
where r."ReservaId" not in (select "ReservaId" from "ReservaBandejaCorreo" where "TipoNotificacionCodigo" = 'NotificaAseoCheckOut')

  "ReservaId",

left join "Pais" p

  r."ReservaId",

-- Hora local Chile (timestamp sin tz) para ver y mostrar
((r."Reserva_checkOutDate"::date - 1)::timestamp + time '21:00') AS "ProgDiaAntes21Chile_CL",

-- Instante absoluto (timestamptz) para comparar con now()
(((r."Reserva_checkOutDate"::date - 1)::timestamp + time '21:00')
  AT TIME ZONE 'America/Santiago') AS "ProgDiaAntes21Chile_TZ"
  
FROM public."Reserva" r
LEFT JOIN public."Huesped" h
  ON h."HuespedId" = r."HuespedId"
LEFT JOIN public."Alojamiento" al
  ON al."AlojamientoId" = r."AlojamientoId"
left join "Pais" p 
on h."IdPais" = p."PaisId"
left join "AseoReservaCheckOut" aseo 
on r."ReservaId" = aseo."ReservaId"
where r."ReservaId" not in (select "ReservaId" from "ReservaBandejaWhatsapp" where "TipoNotificacionCodigo" = 'NotificaAseoCheckOutDiaAntes')

where r."ReservaId" not in (select "ReservaId" from "ReservaBandejaWhatsapp" where "TipoNotificacionCodigo" = 'NotificaAseoCheckOut')

left join "Pais" p

where r."ReservaId" not in (select "ReservaId" from "AseoReservaCheckOut" where "AseoTipoCodigo" = 'AseoCheckOut')

  (COUNT(*) > 0) AS "hasData",
  COUNT(*)       AS "cnt"
FROM public."Reserva"
WHERE "ReservaId" not in (select "ReservaId" from "AseoReservaCheckOut")
SELECT timezone('America/Santiago', now()) AS chile_timestamptz;
SELECT timezone('America/Santiago', now()) AS chile_timestamptz;

SELECT
  TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '10 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "from",
  TO_CHAR((CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '3 months')::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "to",
  'arrival' AS "dateType";

UPDATE public."Reserva" r
SET
  "Reserva_checkInDate"  = (s."checkInDate")::date,
  "Reserva_checkOutDate" = (s."checkOutDate")::date,
  "Reserva_checkInTime"  = (s."checkInTime")::time,
  "Reserva_checkOutTime" = (s."checkOutTime")::time,
  "Reserva_status"       = s."payload"->>'status',
  "UpdatedAt"            = now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Santiago'
FROM public."ReservaStage" s
WHERE r."Reserva__id" = s."_id"
  AND s."_id" IS NOT NULL;

update public."Reserva" r
set
  "AlojamientoId" = a."AlojamientoId",
  "UpdatedAt" = now()
from public."Alojamiento" a
where
  r."AlojamientoId" is null
  and r."Reserva__idlisting" is not null
  and r."Reserva__idlisting" = a."AlojamientoStayslistingIdLargo";

where
  r."HuespedId" is null
  and r."Reserva__idclient" is not null
  and r."Reserva__idclient" = h."StaysClientId";

WITH pais_norm AS (
  SELECT
    p."PaisId",
    ('+' || regexp_replace(p."PaisCodigoTelefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) AS dial_plus,
    regexp_replace(p."PaisCodigoTelefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g')          AS dial_digits
  FROM public."Pais" p
  WHERE p."PaisCodigoTelefono" IS NOT NULL
    AND p."PaisCodigoTelefono" <> ''
    AND regexp_replace(p."PaisCodigoTelefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g') <> ''
),
huesped_norm AS (
  SELECT
    h."HuespedId",
    regexp_replace(h."Telefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AS phone_digits,
    CASE
      WHEN h."Telefono" ~ '^\s*\+' THEN
        '+' || regexp_replace(h."Telefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
      WHEN regexp_replace(h."Telefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g') ~ '^00' THEN
        '+' || substr(regexp_replace(h."Telefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 3)
      ELSE
        '+' || regexp_replace(h."Telefono", '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
    END AS phone_plus
  FROM public."Huesped" h
  WHERE h."IdPais" IS NULL
    AND h."Telefono" IS NOT NULL
    AND h."Telefono" <> ''
),
best_match AS (
  SELECT
    h."HuespedId",
    p."PaisId",
    row_number() OVER (
      PARTITION BY h."HuespedId"
      ORDER BY length(p.dial_digits) DESC, p."PaisId"
    ) AS rn
  FROM huesped_norm h
  JOIN pais_norm p
    ON (
      h.phone_plus   LIKE p.dial_plus   || '%'
      OR
      h.phone_digits LIKE p.dial_digits || '%'
    )
)
UPDATE public."Huesped" h
SET "IdPais" = m."PaisId"
FROM best_match m
WHERE h."HuespedId" = m."HuespedId"
  AND m.rn = 1
  AND h."IdPais" IS NULL;

  "AlojamientoStaysInternalName",
  "PaisNombreEspanol",
  "AseoReservaCheckOutId"
FROM public."Reserva" r
LEFT JOIN public."Huesped" h
  ON h."HuespedId" = r."HuespedId"
LEFT JOIN public."Alojamiento" al
  ON al."AlojamientoId" = r."AlojamientoId"
left join "Pais" p 
on h."IdPais" = p."PaisId"
left join "AseoReservaCheckOut" aseo 
on r."ReservaId" = aseo."ReservaId"
where r."ReservaId" not in (select "ReservaId" from "ReservaBandejaWhatsapp" where "TipoNotificacionCodigo" = 'NotificaAseoCheckOut')

select 
  "ReservaId",
  "Reserva__id",
  al."AlojamientoId",
  h."HuespedId",
  "Reserva_id",
  "Reserva_creationDate",
  "Reserva_checkInDate",
  "Reserva_checkOutDate",
  "Reserva_checkInTime",
  "Reserva_checkOutTime",
  "Reserva__idlisting",
  "Reserva__idclient",
  "Reserva_type",
  "Reserva_guests",
  "StaysClientId",
  "StaysContactId",
  "NombreCompleto",
  "Email",
  "Telefono",
  "IdPais",
  "AlojamientoNumero",
  "AlojamientoNombre",
  "AlojamientoStaysInternalName",
  "PaisNombreEspanol"
FROM public."Reserva" r
LEFT JOIN public."Huesped" h
  ON h."HuespedId" = r."HuespedId"
LEFT JOIN public."Alojamiento" al
  ON al."AlojamientoId" = r."AlojamientoId"
left join "Pais" p 
on h."IdPais" = p."PaisId"

where r."ReservaId" not in (select "ReservaId" from "AseoReservaCheckOut" where "AseoTipoCodigo" = 'AseoCheckOut')

SELECT
  (COUNT(*) > 0) AS "hasData",
  COUNT(*)       AS "cnt"
FROM public."Reserva"
WHERE "ReservaId" not in (select "ReservaId" from "AseoReservaCheckOut")
SELECT timezone('America/Santiago', now()) AS chile_timestamptz;
SELECT timezone('America/Santiago', now()) AS chile_timestamptz;

SELECT
  TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '10 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "from",
  TO_CHAR((CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '3 months')::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "to",
  'arrival' AS "dateType";
